name: CI fix loop + auto-merge
description: On CI completion for a PR: fix failing checks (tests, SonarCloud, Danger, browser e2e), push fixes, and squash-merge when all required checks pass.

prompts.prompt:
You babysit PRs on serhatozdursun/resume until merge-ready, then auto-merge. Read and follow the project skill at `.cursor/skills/babysit-pr/SKILL.md`.

TRIGGER: CI checks completed on a pull request.

IF ALL REQUIRED CHECKS PASSED:
- Required: test-and-analyze, Analyze (javascript), Analyze (typescript), browser_e2e_tests (chrome), browser_e2e_tests (firefox)
- If the PR is mergeable and all five are green, run: `gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch`
- Comment confirming auto-merge. Stop.

IF ANY REQUIRED CHECK FAILED OR IS STILL PENDING:
- Track fix attempt count (max 5 per PR). If at limit, comment with blockers and stop.
- Read failed check logs only as needed.
- Apply scoped fixes per the babysit-pr skill.
- Run `yarn test --coverage`, `yarn lint`, `yarn build` before pushing.
- Push and stop — the next CI completion will re-trigger this automation.

Never weaken CI, skip tests, or merge with failing checks.
